title: Content-Based Smart E-Mail Dispatcher Using Large Language Models
abstract: arXiv:2606.26593v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Email communication has become an integral part of personal and professional life, but handling its vast volume is still a significant issue for large organisations. Manual perusal of emails and forwarding their contents and attachments to intended recipients using other instant messaging platforms has proved to be error-prone and time-consuming leading to losses in terms of productivity and creating undue stress. The main objective of this paper is to explore an alternative mechanism that is to automate the task of dispatching emails based on their contents to the respective WhatsApp groups of students of various semesters of programs in an engineering college, facilitating a smooth flow of information from one end to another end in an organisation. The dispatcher system is built using agents querying large language models (LLMs) to enable it to analyze the contents of emails and route them to the relevant groups of students for their i

Title: Content-Based Smart E-Mail Dispatcher Using Large Language Models
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26593v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Email communication has become an integral part of personal and professional life, but handling its vast volume is still a significant issue for large organisations. Manual perusal of emails and forwarding their contents and attachments to intended recipients using other instant messaging platforms has proved to be error-prone and time-consuming leading to losses in terms of productivity and creating undue stress. The main objective of this paper is to explore an alternative mechanism that is to automate the task of dispatching emails based on their contents to the respective WhatsApp groups of students of various semesters of programs in an engineering college, facilitating a smooth flow of information from one end to another end in an organisation. The dispatcher system is built using agents querying large language models (LLMs) to enable it to analyze the contents of emails and route them to the relevant groups of students for their i
translated_title: 基于内容的大语言模型智能邮件分发系统
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26593v1 公告类型：新 摘要：电子邮件通信已成为个人和职业生活中不可或缺的一部分，但处理其海量数量对大型组织来说仍是一个重大挑战。通过其他即时通讯平台手动阅读邮件并将其内容和附件转发给目标收件人已被证明容易出错且耗时，导致生产力损失并造成不必要的压力。本文的主要目标是探索一种替代机制，即根据邮件内容自动将邮件分派到工程学院各年级学生对应的WhatsApp群组，从而促进组织内信息从一端到另一端的顺畅流动。该分发系统基于代理查询大语言模型（LLM）构建，使其能够分析邮件内容并将其路由到相关学生群组以供其使用。
tldr: 本文提出一种基于大语言模型的智能邮件分发系统，通过代理查询LLM自动分析邮件内容并路由到相应WhatsApp群组，以解决人工处理邮件耗时易错的问题。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes a content-based smart email dispatcher using LLM agents to automatically analyze and route emails to corresponding WhatsApp groups, addressing the time-consuming and error-prone nature of manual email handling.
